hero.badge: The AI Era for Kirana Stores
hero.subhead: Meet Dukaan Saathi. Your intelligent business partner that tracks sales, inventory, and udhaar instantly—just by talking to it.

problem.eyebrow: Every "easy" app still asks you to change how you work
problem.heading: Digital tools keep failing the corner shop — for very human reasons.

time.title: No time
time.body: The shop is full at 8am. Nobody is going to stop and type entries into a form during the morning rush.

tech.title: Low tech comfort
tech.body: WhatsApp voice notes? Yes, daily. Navigating menus, dashboards and settings? That's a different world.

learn.title: Learning curve
learn.body: Every 'simple' billing app still needs a weekend of learning. Most owners quit by day three.

cost.title: Perceived cost
cost.body: ₹500/month for software feels like a luxury when the pen-and-notebook has worked for 20 years.

habit.title: Existing habits
habit.body: The bahi-khata (ledger) and the customer's udhaar page are muscle memory. Change is friction.

problem.closingTitle: So we stopped asking shopkeepers to change.
problem.closingBody: Dukaan Saathi meets them exactly where they already are: their voice, their WhatsApp, and their notebook.

how.heading: Three ways in. Zero of them feel like software.

voice.label: 🎙️ Just Speak
voice.heading: Speak a sale the way you'd tell a helper.
voice.body: Talk in Hindi, Telugu or English. Dukaan Saathi transcribes it, understands item, quantity, price and party — and files it instantly.

photo.label: 📸 Just Snap
photo.heading: Snap your notebook. It reads your handwriting.
photo.body: Photograph a page of your bahi-khata. Our OCR reads each handwritten line and turns the whole day into clean, structured entries.
photo.example: One photo → a full day of udhaar, digitised

text.label: 💬 Just Text
text.heading: Ask your shop anything, on WhatsApp.
text.body: No dashboard to open. Message a plain question and get a plain answer — today's profit, who owes you, what's running low.

demo.heading: Don't take our word for it. Talk to the shop.
demo.sub: This is a working demo connected to a real backend — tap any question and watch Dukaan Saathi reply the way it would on a real WhatsApp.
demo.inputPlaceholder: Or just speak — voice works too…

loop.heading: One habit in. A running business out.

in.title: Speak · Snap · Text
in.body: The owner talks, sends a WhatsApp, or photographs the notebook.

ai.title: AI Parsing Engine
ai.body: Understands item, quantity, price, party & intent — in Hindi, Telugu or English.

db.title: Ledger + Inventory
db.body: Sales, stock and udhaar update themselves, instantly and correctly.

out.title: Plain-language Answer
out.body: A clear reply comes back: profit, dues, low stock — no dashboard needed.

loop.footnote: The loop closes in under 3 seconds — fast enough to use mid-sale, without ever putting the pen down for long.

impact.heading: Built for the shop that was never invited to "digital India."

shops.label: unorganised retail shops in India
shops.sub: the vast majority still on pen & paper

training.label: of training required
training.sub: if you can send a voice note, you can run it

voice.label: of shop tasks by voice alone

compare.heading: We're not another dashboard. We're the end of dashboards.
compare.why1Q: Why voice/WhatsApp-first, not a full ERP?
compare.why1A: English, typing-first billing apps already exist — and they don't get used. The barrier was never features; it was the interface. Meeting owners in their own voice and language is the product.
compare.why2Q: Why we don't compete with SAP / Oracle
compare.why2A: Enterprise ERPs serve organised chains with staff and computers. We serve the 12M+ single-owner shops they were never designed for. Different user, different interface, different market entirely.

dashToggle.prompt: Voice is the point — but the data is all there if you ever want to look.
dashToggle.show: Prefer a screen? See the optional dashboard
dashToggle.note: Read-only preview · a secondary view, never a requirement.

team.heading: The best way to understand Dukaan Saathi is to talk to it.
team.sub: Open the WhatsApp simulator and run a few questions — it's the exact experience a shop owner gets on day one.

footer.disclaimer: Built with React, Tailwind, Express & Claude. Voice by Sarvam AI, WhatsApp by Twilio.

login.title: Shop login
login.subtitle: Sign in to see your live shop dashboard.
login.numberHint: The number you use with Dukaan Saathi (with country code)
login.resetSubtitle: Set a new PIN for your shop

dashboard.title: Shop dashboard
dashboard.noSales: No sales yet today. Send a WhatsApp to log your first one!
dashboard.noStock: No products yet. They appear as you log sales.
dashboard.expenseCatPrompt: What was the expense for? (e.g. rent, transport, tea)
dashboard.resetConfirm: Clear all sales, dues, expenses and inventory for this shop?
dashboard.saleValidation: Enter an item and a positive amount
dashboard.saleNeedCustomer: Enter a customer name for udhaar
dashboard.insightLoss: Running at a loss today — expenses {{expenses}}

sim.title: WhatsApp Simulator
sim.subtitle: This talks to the real Dukaan Saathi backend. Everything you log here shows up on the dashboard.
sim.greeting: 👋 Namaste! I'm Dukaan Saathi. Type or record a message — try a sale, an udhaar, or ask for today's profit. English, Hindi or Telugu all work.
sim.voiceHint: Tap the mic and speak — English, Hindi or Telugu. It types as you talk.

samples.dues: kaun kaun ka udhaar baaki hai
samples.stock: kya kya khatam ho raha hai
